summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of the Casino Signal Platform. All major features are working correctly including backend APIs, frontend loading, platform selection, slot grid navigation, signal generation, and user interactions.
passed_tests: Backend API health check at /api/ returns 'Hello World'
POST /api/status creates status checks successfully
GET /api/status retrieves status checks correctly
CORS configuration working properly
API response times under 0.2 seconds
Frontend loads correctly at provided URL
PlatformSelector page renders with Mario hologram and 20 orbiting platform logos
SINAIS AO VIVO badge visible and functional
All 5 provider tabs present (PG Soft, Pragmatic Play, Spirit Gaming, Tada Gaming, Reeveme)
200+ games count indicator working
HG JOGO and FG JOGO ENTRAR buttons found and clickable
Navigation from platform selection to slot grid working
Slot grid loads with 67 slot cards showing game images and names
Slot card click opens SignalGenerator correctly
SignalGenerator shows complete interface with game info, signals, and controls
Copy game name functionality working with success notification
Signal details display (ENTRADA DIRETA, confidence %, entry recommendations)
Platform access button (IR PARA PLATAFORMA) present and functional
Real-time indicators (Sem pagar, Desde bônus, Ciclo) working
Historical data graph displaying correctly
Back navigation from SignalGenerator to slot grid working
WhatsApp button visible in bottom right corner
Responsive design working across different screen elements
Mock data integration working correctly
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
